REPRESENTED BY JANICE CONDON-COOK, CREDIT AND COLLECTION MANAGER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ICULINAIRE LLC DBA 3RD COUSIN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J.
